feed.title: Void Lucidity
feed.subtitle: Write an awesome description for your new site here. You can edit this line in _config.yml. It will appear in your document head meta (for Google search results) and in your feed.xml site description.

entry.title: Init
entry.content:
Welcome to my blog! This is my first post and the beginning of my writing.

I am starting this blog to share my experiences operating in this live and the interesting things I have learned. I am calling it “Operation Manual” because I want to write about how to operate ourselves here. My aim is to set it to be more technical and pragmatic even though I am intending to write about very far reaches for which there are hardly any operation manuals.

Note: This is subject to change.
entry.summary: Welcome to my blog! This is my first post and the beginning of my writing.
